description: Mac Mini (Apple Silicon) — MLX-LM backend. Replaces mac-mini entries in models-best.json / models-us-eu.json for Apple Silicon hosts.
notes: mlx_lm.server serves one model at a time — restart to switch models.
Mixed fleet (PC/Laptop on Ollama + Mac Mini on MLX): merge these mac-mini entries into your base models-best.json or models-us-eu.json.
Single Mac Mini only: use this file directly as ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
Embeddings: keep Ollama running only for nomic-embed-text (1.5 GB) — not worth replacing.

models.notes: #1 coding benchmarks — ~18 GB unified memory. mlx_lm.server --model mlx-community/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct-4bit --port 8080 --host 0.0.0.0
Deep reasoning and architecture review — ~38 GB unified memory. Fits M4 Pro 48 GB.
Strong EU coding model — ~12 GB unified memory
RAG-heavy tasks, 128K context — ~19 GB unified memory

embeddings.notes: Keep Ollama for embeddings only — 1.5 GB, no MLX-native replacement needed
